data.title: FDIC plans to regulate stablecoin issuers under GENIUS Act, extending insurance to corporate deposits only, not holders.
data.description: The FDIC has put forth regulations suggesting to insure corporate deposits of stablecoin issuers, but this coverage will not be available to stablecoin holders due to potential conflicts with the GENIUS Act's provisions, as stated by the FDIC.

data.title: Pricing of Public Offering of Common Stock
data.description: In New York, Tamboran Resources Corporation (NYSE: TBN, ASX: TBN) released a statement regarding the offering of their securities, which can only be done through the prospectus supplement and base prospectus filed with the SEC. Interested individuals can access the preliminary prospectus supplement and base prospectus for free on the SEC’s website at www.sec.gov under Tamboran’s name. Further details can be obtained from the joint book-running managers.

data.title: Data Breach Alert: Edelson Lechtzin LLP Investigates SitusAMC Holdings Corporation Data Breach
data.description: In New York on April 7, 2026, Edelson Lechtzin LLP, a prominent class action law firm, announced an investigation into data privacy issues related to the SitusAMC Holdings Corporation data breach. The breach, which occurred on November 12, 2025, involved unauthorized access to Key data. The firm aims to address claims regarding this incident to ensure accountability for the breach.

data.title: U.S.-Led Consortium Agrees to Acquire Movistar Mexico to Build the Country’s Next-Generation Telecom Operator, Powered by OXIO’s Telecom-as-a-Service Platform
data.description: OXIO Inc. and Newfoundland Capital Management have revealed a joint U.S.-investor consortium agreement to purchase Movistar Mexico from Telefónica S.A. (BME: TEF), a global telecom company based in Madrid. The acquisition aims to propel Movistar Mexico into its next growth stage, utilizing OXIO’s Telecom-as-a-Service platform to facilitate a shift towards a modernized, cloud-based operating structure. This strategic move positions Movistar Mexico for enhanced agility and digital innovation, spelling out a promising future for the company.
